candidate_llm_application: LLM activation null-space carving: subtract from over-represented activation layers to reveal underlying task-relevant features; null-space traversal as feature exposure.

results.title: Activation Steering / Null-Space Ablation: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on activation steering / null-space ablation, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (activation steering / null-space ablation); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (ancient-glass-blowing terms vs LLM terms).
